title: phreatia scandens
intro: Phreatia scandens is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia, specifically found in the tropical forests of Sri Lanka and India, characterized by its delicate white flowers and climbing habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phreatia scandens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. Phreatia scandens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
